name: AppBank Inc.
summary: AppBank Inc. provides iPhone applications, iPhone case accessories, and iPhone related news through AppBank.net site. It also provides media services through Max Murai Channel and Studio Murai; and operates gaming Websites, including Pazudora Ultimate Capture media and Monster Strike Strategy Media, as well as iPhone and android applications. In addition, the company offers puzzle games; and sells banner advertisements and advertorials to support companies and individual developers. Further, it engages in the rights management and store businesses. AppBank Inc. was founded in 2008 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
